privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env solar_panel_array_modeling task by verifying that the data is a real IFC4 building model (FZK-Haus) downloaded from ifcwiki.org. Confirmed the expected system keywords ['solar', 'pv', 'photovoltaic'], property keywords ['power', 'watt', 'capacity'], and a minimum of 6 solar devices explicitly match the task description instructions, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic.
